summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Drip Campaigns features including pre-built campaigns, campaign launch, phone number deletion request, amount requested field, and Lead Revival removal. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all major features.
seed_data_creation: Test clients with TEST_ prefix were created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All drip campaign features are working correctly. The pre-built campaigns API returns 4 templates (new_lead, funded_short, funded_medium, funded_long). The New Lead campaign has 54 messages. Phone number deletion is now via Settings page only. Lead Revival page has been removed from navigation and routes.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/campaigns/prebuilt/new_lead/la: PASS - Enrolls clients with New Lead tag

frontend_ui_tests.Bulk Templated Campaign button: PASS - Visible on Drip Campaigns page
frontend_ui_tests.New Lead campaign preview: PASS - Shows 54 messages with Start Campaign button
frontend_ui_tests.Lead Revival page removed: PASS - Not in navigation, route redirects to landing page
frontend_ui_tests.Funded deal campaign prompt: PASS - Dialog options visible in client dropdown

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - Campaign messages are stored but not sent
